nodes.name: 南里奥格兰德州
nodes.summary: 南里奥格兰德州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联89种鸟类，包括孤䳍、黄腿穴䳍、Long-trained nightjar等89种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Squamate antbird
nodes.summary: Squamate antbird（Squamate antbird，学名 Myrmoderus squamosus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联6个分布地点节点。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The squamate antbird is found in eastern Brazil from southern São Paulo state south to northern Rio Grande do Sul. There is also one record from Iguaçu National Park in western Paraná.Straube, F.C., Urben-Filho, A

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In Portuguese. The species mostly inhabits the floor of evergreen forest and nearby mature secondary forest, and is also found locally near the coast in restinga woodland on sandy soil
